chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Months of Hajj, the Months of Pilgrimage, and the Sacred Months

text: 2963 - وَ رَوَى أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ اَلْأَحْوَلُ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ فَرَضَ اَلْحَجَّ فِي غَيْرِ أَشْهُرِ اَلْحَجِّ قَالَ «يَجْعَلُهَا عُمْرَةً ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2963 - Abu Ja'far al-Ahwal narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a man who enters Ihram for Hajj outside of the months of Hajj.
Imam (as) said: "He should make it an Umrah."
